documentation_gates.notes: Closeout docs, tracked state, runtime, and PR evidence ownership are documented and wired into validators.
Promotion checklist and evidence ledger exist.

operational_gates.notes: Manual handoff is locked as an exception-only path; provider waits use pause + scheduled resume.
Live smoke has a required trigger matrix, Actual Verification evidence source, and recurring rehearsal cadence.
Scheduler standard locks macOS launchd as the team-shared default plus non-macOS fallback and verify/watch cadence.

pilot_lanes.label: Authority-required UI lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Use slice06 as the canary for anchor-extension authority flow.

pilot_lanes.label: External smoke lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Need one pilot with real smoke evidence traced from source PR to closeout preflight.

pilot_lanes.label: Bugfix patch lane
pilot_lanes.notes: Need one small bugfix/post-merge patch to compare lead time and blocked retry behavior.

promotion_gate.next_review_trigger: After slice06 Stage 4 checkpoint and at least one external-smoke pilot.
promotion_gate.notes: Stay in promotion-candidate mode until the required pilot lanes pass.
